name: Wonder of the Seas
description: Wonder of the Seas is the world's largest cruise ship by gross tonnage. It features eight distinct neighborhoods, a zip line, 10 water slides, an ice skating rink, a surf simulator, and a wide variety of dining and entertainment options.

recreation: 4 pools including H2O Zone kids waterpark
included: All meals in Main Dining Room and Windjammer buffet
Live entertainment and Broadway shows
Kids & teens clubs (Adventure Ocean)
Access to pools, fitness center, and sports areas
Flowrider surf simulator and rock climbing wall

name: Icon of the Seas
description: Icon of the Seas debuted in 2024 as the world's largest cruise ship. It features six water slides, the largest waterpark at sea, eight neighborhoods, and a tropical garden, representing the next generation of Royal Caribbean mega-ships.

entertainment: Category 6 waterpark (6 slides — largest at sea)
RipCord by iFly indoor skydiving simulator
recreation: 6 pools including Chill Island and Surfside family area
included: All meals in Main Dining Room and Windjammer buffet
Live entertainment and shows
Kids & teens clubs (Adventure Ocean)
Access to all pools, fitness center, and sports areas
Flowrider surf simulator and rock climbing wall

name: Symphony of the Seas
description: Symphony of the Seas was the world's largest cruise ship when it launched in 2018. A sister ship to Wonder of the Seas, it features the same eight neighborhoods including Central Park, Boardwalk, and the thrilling Perfect Storm waterslides.

name: Mardi Gras
description: Mardi Gras is Carnival's largest and most innovative ship, featuring BOLT — the first rollercoaster at sea. It introduced a new zone concept with six themed "zones" including a French Quarter, La Piazza, and Summer Landing.

entertainment: BOLT electric roller coaster (first at sea)

name: Celebrity Millennium
description: Celebrity Millennium launched in 2000 as the first of the Millennium class and is one of Celebrity's most beloved ships. It underwent a major 'revolutionized' refurbishment in 2019, gaining new specialty restaurants, a redesigned The Retreat, and updated staterooms while retaining its classic elegance.

included: All meals in main restaurant and Oceanview Café
Celebrity Always Included (drinks, Wi-Fi, gratuities)
Live entertainment and theater shows
Access to pools and fitness center
Enrichment programs and lectures

name: Celebrity Equinox
description: Celebrity Equinox is the second Solstice-class ship. It is famous for its real lawn on the top deck — The Lawn Club — the first real grass lawn at sea. After its 2019 Revolution refurbishment, it gained Eden (a bar, restaurant, and entertainment space spanning three decks) and new suite options.

included: All meals in main restaurant and Oceanview Café
Celebrity Always Included (drinks, Wi-Fi, gratuities)
Live entertainment and theater shows
Access to pools, fitness center, and The Lawn Club
Enrichment programs and lectures

name: Celebrity Reflection
description: Celebrity Reflection is the fifth and largest Solstice-class ship. It was refurbished in 2020 as part of Celebrity's Revolution program, receiving a redesigned The Retreat, new suite classes, and updated public spaces. Reflection is known for its elegant design and extensive art collection, with over 3,500 original works on board.

included: All meals in main restaurant and Oceanview Café
Celebrity Always Included (drinks, Wi-Fi, gratuities)

name: Celebrity Eclipse
description: Celebrity Eclipse is the third Solstice-class ship. Homeporting in Southampton, UK, it is the most popular Celebrity ship for British travelers. It underwent the Celebrity Revolution refurbishment and features the iconic Lawn Club, Martini Bar and Crush, and the atmospheric Cellar Masters wine bar.

included: All meals in main restaurant and Oceanview Café

name: Celebrity Silhouette
description: Celebrity Silhouette is the fourth Solstice-class ship. Launched in 2011, it was the first Celebrity ship to feature The Lawn Club Grill, an interactive outdoor dining experience on the ship's famous grass lawn. Following its Celebrity Revolution refurbishment, Silhouette now features updated staterooms, The Retreat, and contemporary dining venues.

dining: Lawn Club Grill outdoor dining (first on Celebrity)

name: Celebrity Solstice
description: Celebrity Solstice was the first ship in Celebrity's groundbreaking Solstice class, launched in 2008. It introduced the revolutionary real grass Lawn Club on the top deck — a first in the cruise industry. Following a 2023 renewal, the Renewed Celebrity Solstice offers updated amenities, new dining venues, and modernized staterooms.

entertainment: The Lawn Club (real grass — world first)

name: Celebrity Constellation
description: Celebrity Constellation is the fourth Millennium-class ship. After its Celebrity Revolution refurbishment, it features updated suites, a redesigned The Retreat sundeck, and contemporary dining options. It is known for its art collection, including works by Dale Chihuly, and its classic Celebrity elegance.

name: Celebrity Infinity
description: Celebrity Infinity is the second Millennium-class ship. It was among the first Celebrity ships to undergo the Celebrity Revolution refurbishment program, receiving a full interior redesign, new suite experiences, and updated dining venues. The ship primarily sails Alaska and South America itineraries.

name: Celebrity Summit
description: Celebrity Summit is the third Millennium-class ship. Revolutionized in 2019, it homeports in Bayonne, New Jersey — the closest Celebrity ship to New York City. It serves the popular Bermuda and Canada/New England routes, offering an accessible taste of Celebrity's premium experience for East Coast travelers.

included: All meals in main restaurant and Oceanview Café

name: Celebrity Flora
description: Celebrity Flora is a unique expedition yacht purpose-built exclusively for Galápagos Islands cruises. As the first purpose-built ship for the Galápagos, it accommodates only 100 guests, offering an intimate eco-adventure experience. The ship carries zodiacs, snorkeling gear, kayaks, and glass-bottom boats for exploring the islands' remote wildlife sanctuaries.

included: All meals and non-alcoholic beverages
Wi-Fi
Gratuities
All Galápagos shore excursions and Zodiac landings
Snorkeling and kayaking gear
Expert naturalist guides on every excursion
Park fees

name: Celebrity Xcel
description: Celebrity Xcel is the fifth and newest ship in Celebrity's Edge class, debuting in 2025. The most technologically advanced ship in the Celebrity fleet, Xcel features the signature Magic Carpet cantilevered platform, upgraded Edge Staterooms, and the latest iteration of Celebrity's award-winning restaurant and entertainment concepts.

dining: Eden restaurant and bar (3-deck immersive venue)
Le Petit Chef & Friends digital dining (specialty)
